igbo.unique_almost_perfectly_aligned_with_r: Pụrụ iche: ọ fọrọ nke nta ka ọ kwekọọ n'ọkpọkọ ntụgharị. Etiti haịdrojen ígwè.

igbo.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_charge: Ubi magnet Ụwa na-achụpụ mkpụrụ anyanwụ nwere ọkụ eletrik. Ozone na-enyere aka na UV, mana ubi magnet bụ ọta izizi!
igbo.the_iau_s_2006_definition_requires_pla: Nkọwa IAU nke 2006 chọrọ ka mbaraụwa kpochapụ agbata obi okirikiri ha site na mkpọfu ndị ọzọ.
igbo.also_called_the_goldilocks_zone_not_to: A na-akpọkwa ya 'ebe Goldilocks' — ọ dịghị ọkụ nke ukwuu, ọ dịghị oyi nke ukwuu maka mmiri mmiri n'elu.
igbo.the_moon_rotates_exactly_once_per_orbi: Ọnwa na-agba gburugburu naanị otu ugboro kwa okirikiri — ike mmiri mmiri kpatara nhazi a n'ime ijeri afọ.
igbo.opportunity_rover_found_hematite_blueb: Rover Opportunity chọtara 'blueberries' hematite — mineral ndị na-eme naanị na mmiri. Foto okirikiri na-egosi delta osimiri ochie!
igbo.venus_is_hotter_462_c_vs_430_c_mercury: Venus dị ọkụ karịa (462°C na 430°C)! Mercury enweghị ikuku ga-ejide okpomọkụ. Mmetụta ụlọ enyo dị mkpa karịa anya.
igbo.gas_giants_have_no_solid_surface_they_: Nnukwu mbaraụwa gas enweghị elu siri ike! Ha bụ gas haịdrojen na hịlium nke na-abawanye ịdị arọ nwayọọ nwayọọ ruo n'etiti. Ngwá nyocha ga-anọgide na-emikpu ebighị ebi.
igbo.earth_s_distance_from_the_sun_doesn_t_: Anya dị n'etiti Ụwa na Anyanwụ adịghị agbanwe n'ime otu ụbọchị. Ehihie pụtara naanị na Anyanwụ kacha elu n'eluigwe gị. Ụwa kacha nso na Jenụwarị (perihelion)!
igbo.jupiter_is_11x_wider_than_earth_and_1_: Jupiter sara mbara ugboro 11 karịa Ụwa, Ụwa 1,300 nwekwara ike ịba n'ime ya! Usoro anyanwụ nwere nnukwu ọdịiche n'ịdị ukwuu.
igbo.pluto_is_still_in_the_solar_system_it_: Pluto ka dị na usoro anyanwụ! A gbanwere ya site na 'mbaraụwa' gaa 'obere mbaraụwa' na 2006, mana ọ ka na-agba Anyanwụ gburugburu.
igbo.the_asteroid_belt_is_mostly_empty_spac: Belt asteroid bụ ebe efu n'ihe ka ọtụtụ! Anya dị n'etiti asteroid bụ nde kilomita. Ụgbọ elu mbara igwe na-agafe n'enweghị ihe ize ndụ.
igbo.not_always_saturn_is_95x_earth_s_mass_: Ọ bụghị mgbe niile! Ibu Saturn bụ ugboro 95 nke Ụwa mana ike ndọda n'elu bụ naanị 1.06g n'ihi na ọ buru ibu ma nwee ntakịrị ịdị arọ. Ibu dabere n'ibu NA obosara.
igbo.all_parts_of_the_moon_receive_sunlight: Akụkụ Ọnwa niile na-enweta ìhè anyanwụ! 'Akụkụ dị anya' bụ naanị ọkara anyị na-apụghị ịhụ site na Ụwa n'ihi njikọ mmiri mmiri. Ọ na-enweta anyanwụ otu aka ahụ.
igbo.the_habitable_zone_or_goldilocks_zone_: Ebe a ga-ebi (ma ọ bụ 'ebe Goldilocks') bụ ogo anya site na kpakpando ebe mmiri mmiri nwere ike ịdị n'elu mbaraụwa. Na usoro anyanwụ anyị, Venus dị n'ọnụ ime, Ụwa dị n'etiti, Mars dịkwa n'ọnụ èzí. Mana mmiri mmiri chọkwara ikuku na ubi magnet ziri ezi!
igbo.when_sunlight_heats_a_planet_s_surface: Mgbe ìhè anyanwụ na-ekpo elu mbaraụwa ọkụ, elu na-ezipụ okpomọkụ (infrared). Gas ụlọ enyo (CO₂, CH₄, H₂O) na-amịkọrọ okpomọkụ a ma zipụ ya ọzọ, na-ekpo mbaraụwa ọkụ. Ụlọ enyo Ụwa bụ +33°C (na-echekwa ndụ). Nke Venus bụ +510°C (adịghị achịkwa). Mars enweghị ọbụna (nkezi -60°C). Ọnụọgụ gas ụlọ enyo na-ekpebi ihe ga-eme!
igbo.a_planet_s_magnetic_field_creates_a_ma: Ubi magnet mbaraụwa na-emepụta 'magnetosphere' — ọta a na-adịghị ahụ anya nke na-achụpụ ifufe anyanwụ (mkpụrụ nwere ọkụ eletrik si n'Anyanwụ). Magnetosphere Ụwa na-echebe ikuku anyị ma mee ka ndụ kwe omume. Mars tụfuru ubi magnet ya ijeri afọ 4 gara aga, e wepụkwara ikuku ya nwayọọ nwayọọ. Magnetosphere Jupiter siri ike ugboro 20,000 karịa nke Ụwa!
igbo.why_isn_t_pluto_a_planet: Gịnị Mere Pluto Ejighị Bụrụ Mbaraụwa?
igbo.in_2006_the_international_astronomical: Na 2006, Òtù Ndị Ọkà Mmụta Kpakpando Ụwa Niile (IAU) kọwara ihe atọ maka mbaraụwa: (1) Na-agba Anyanwụ gburugburu ✓, (2) Nwere ibu zuru ezu maka ụdị gburugburu ✓, (3) 'Ekpochapụla okirikiri ya' nke mkpọfu ndị ọzọ ✗. Pluto na-ekekọrịta ebe okirikiri ya na puku ihe Belt Kuiper, ya mere e kewara ya 'obere mbaraụwa.' Nke a emeghị ka ọ ghara ịdị mkpa — New Horizons gosipụtara na ọ na-arụ ọrụ n'ụdị ala!
igbo.over_billions_of_years_gravitational_t: N'ime ijeri afọ, ike mmiri mmiri nwere ike ibelata ntụgharị ọnwa ruo mgbe ọ dabara na ogologo okirikiri ya. Nsonaazụ: otu ihu na-eche mbaraụwa mgbe niile. Ọnwa anyị jikọtara na Ụwa. Mercury jikọtara akụkụ na Anyanwụ (oke 3:2). Pluto na Charon jikọtara onwe ha — ha na-egosi ibe ha otu ihu mgbe niile!
igbo.a_biosignature_is_any_evidence_of_past: Akara ndụ (biosignature) bụ ihe ọ bụla na-egosi ndụ gara aga ma ọ bụ nke ugbu a. Ndị ọkà mmụta sayensị na-achọ: (1) mmiri mmiri, (2) mkpụrụ organic, (3) gas ikuku dị ka ọksijen ma ọ bụ metan nke na-agaghị adị ma ọ bụrụ na ndụ emepụtaghị ha, (4) isi iyi ike. igbo.drag_the_alignment_slider_to_line_up_s: Dọrọ slaịda nhazi ka i doo Anyanwụ, Ọnwa, na Ụwa n'ahịrị. Gbanwee n'etiti nchupụ anyanwụ na nke ọnwa.
igbo.adjust_solar_wind_latitude_and_altitud: Hazie ifufe anyanwụ, latitud, na ịdị elu iji hazie ìhè ndịda. Agba dabere n'ụdị mkpụrụ na-akpali atọm ikuku.
igbo.a_comet_gets_two_tails_when_it_nears_t: Kpakpando nwere ọdụ na-enweta ọdụ abụọ mgbe ọ dị nso na Anyanwụ. Hazie anya + akụkụ ifufe ka ị hụ ka ha si emepụta.
igbo.curved_pushed_by_photon_radiation_pres: — gbagọrọ agbagọ, nrụgide radiation photon na-akwali ya (nwayọọ)
igbo.straight_pushed_by_solar_wind_charged_: — kwụ ọtọ, mkpụrụ ifufe anyanwụ nwere ọkụ eletrik na-akwali ya (ngwa ngwa)
igbo.adjust_mass_and_spin_watch_the_event_h: Hazie ibu na ntụgharị. Lee ka mbara ihe omume si etolite na ka diski nchịkọta si azaghachi. Ntụgharị siri ike na-agbapụ jet isi.
igbo.black_hole_has_3_properties_mass_spin_: Oghere ojii nwere àgwà atọ: ibu, ntụgharị, ọkụ eletrik. Mbara ihe omume bụ ebe a na-adịghị alaghachi — ozugbo ìhè gafere ya, ọ dịghị ihe na-agbapụ. Diski nchịkọta bụ ihe na-agbagharị n'ime, nke mkpọtụ mere ka ọ dị ọkụ ruo nde ogo. Oghere na-agba ngwa ngwa nwere ike ịgbapụ jet dị ọsọ n'ọkpọkọ ntụgharị.
igbo.scrub_earth_years_and_watch_all_five_i: Gagharịa afọ Ụwa ma lee mbaraụwa ime ise niile ka ha na-agba n'ezigbo ọsọ ha. Iwu nke atọ nke Kepler n'ọrụ.
igbo.kepler_s_third_law_orbital_period_squa: Iwu nke atọ nke Kepler: ogologo oge okirikiri okpukpu abụọ ∝ anya okpukpu atọ. Mbaraụwa ime na-agba ọsọ; ndị èzí na-akpụ akpụ. Jupiter na-ewe afọ Ụwa 12 maka otu okirikiri; Mercury na-agbachi kwa ụbọchị 88.
igbo.spacecraft_designer: 🚀 Onye Mepụtara Ụgbọ Elu Mbara Igwe
igbo.build_a_spacecraft_from_real_component: Wuo ụgbọ elu mbara igwe site n'ezigbo akụkụ. Họrọ etiti, ike, nkwali + ibu — lee ka ibu + ọnụ ahịa si emelite.
igbo.the_sun_has_an_11_year_cycle_of_sunspo: Anyanwụ nwere okirikiri afọ 11 nke ọrụ ntụpọ anyanwụ. Gagharịa ka ị hụ ntụpọ anyanwụ na-abịa na-apụ + mbupu CME.
igbo.the_sun_cycles_every_11_years_between_: Anyanwụ na-agbagharị kwa afọ ~11 n'etiti kacha nta (ntụpọ ole na ole, jụụ) na kacha ukwuu (ọtụtụ ntụpọ, ọkụ anyanwụ + CME ugboro ugboro). Okirikiri 25 rutere elu ya ihe dịka 2024-2025 ma ọ na-ada ugbu a.
igbo.where_could_life_as_we_know_it_survive: Ebee ka ndụ dịka anyị maara ya nwere ike ịdị ndụ gburugburu kpakpando ọ bụla? Hazie ìhè kpakpando + anya mbaraụwa ka ị hụ.
igbo.the_habitable_zone_is_where_surface_wa: Ebe a ga-ebi bụ ebe mmiri elu nwere ike ịnọgide na-abụ mmiri. Ọnụ ime: mmetụta ụlọ enyo na-akpọnwụ ya. Ọnụ èzí: mmiri oyi na-ejide CO2, oyi na-adịghị achịkwa. Ọnụ na-eru ka √L.
igbo.drag_the_moon_closer_to_make_earth_s_t: Dọrọ Ọnwa ka ọ bịaruo nso ka mmiri mmiri Ụwa buo ibu. Mara na mkpogharị dị n'akụkụ nso na nke dị anya.
igbo.tides_happen_because_gravity_pulls_mor: Mmiri mmiri na-eme n'ihi na ike ndọda na-adọta ike karịa n'akụkụ nso karịa n'akụkụ dị anya nke Ụwa. Akụkụ abụọ ahụ na-akpogharị n'èzí. Anyanwụ na Ọnwa jikọtara na-emepụta mmiri mmiri ukwuu (n'ahịrị) + nke nta (n'akụkụ).
igbo.rotate_earth_and_adjust_season_watch_t: Tụgharịa Ụwa ma hazie oge. Lee ka oke ehihie/abalị si agagharị + ka mgbagọ ọkpọkọ si agbanwe ọkara ụwa anyanwụ na-enwu.
igbo.five_gravitational_sweet_spots_between: Ebe ike ndọda ise dị mma n'etiti ahụ abụọ ebe ụgbọ elu mbara igwe nwere ike ịkwụsị. James Webb nọ na L2.
igbo.green_stable_equilibria_l4_l5_yellow_u: Akwụkwọ ndụ: nkwụsi ike (L4, L5) • Odo odo: enweghị nkwụsi ike mana bara uru (L1, L2, L3)
igbo.five_points_in_any_two_body_orbit_wher: Ebe ise n'okirikiri ahụ abụọ ọ bụla ebe ike ndọda na mmetụta ọpụpụ etiti hà nhata. Ụgbọ elu mbara igwe nwere ike ịkwụsị ebe a na obere mmanụ. JWST nọ na L2 — mgbe niile n'azụ Ụwa, pụọ n'Anyanwụ.
igbo.each_element_fingerprints_light_in_spe: Ihe ọ bụla na-ahapụ akara mkpịsị aka na ìhè n'ogologo ebili mmiri akọwapụtara. Gagharịa ihe ndị a ka ị hụ ka ndị ọkà mmụta kpakpando si amata ha na kpakpando dị anya.
igbo.visible_light_continuum: Ìhè a na-ahụ anya na-aga n'ihu
igbo.every_element_emits_its_own_unique_pat: Ihe ọ bụla na-ewepụta ụdị ogologo ebili mmiri ìhè nke ya — akara mkpịsị aka spectrum ya. Site n'ile ìhè site na kpakpando dị anya, anyị nwere ike ịmata ihe ha nwere. Otu a ka anyị si mara na Anyanwụ bụ pasent 75 haịdrojen!
igbo.click_constellations_to_see_their_star: Pịa ìgwè kpakpando ka ị hụ kpakpando ha + ahịrị njikọ. Kpakpando ọ bụla nwere agba nke ya + ezigbo aha.
igbo.constellations_are_patterns_of_stars_t: Ìgwè kpakpando bụ ụdị kpakpando nke ọdịbendị matara n'ime puku afọ. IAU haziri ìgwè kpakpando 88 gọọmentị kwadoro na 1922. Kpakpando dị n'otu ìgwè adịkarịghị nso n'ezie — ha na-adị nso naanị site na Ụwa.
igbo.how_much_delta_v_travel_time_to_reach_: Delta-v ole + oge njem ole ka achọrọ iji ruo ebe dị iche iche? E gosipụtara okirikiri mbufe Hohmann.
igbo.a_hohmann_transfer_is_the_most_fuel_ef_2: Mbufe Hohmann bụ ụzọ kacha chekwaa mmanụ maka ngagharị n'etiti okirikiri abụọ. Ọ na-eji ọkụ abụọ: otu iji banye n'ụdị àkwá mbufe, otu iji mee ka ọ bụrụ okirikiri n'ebe a na-aga. Δv bụ mkpokọta mgbanwe ọsọ achọrọ.

igbo.drive_the_rover_from_start_to_goal_cos: Kwọọ rover site na mmalite ruo ebumnuche. Ọnụ ahịa: ala larịị 1,
igbo.plan_the_path_to_conserve_fuel_like_re: Haziere ụzọ iji chekwaa mmanụ. Dịka ezigbo rover Mars, mita ọ bụla chọrọ nhazi mmanụ.
igbo.how_astronomers_measure_distance_each_: Ka ndị ọkà mmụta kpakpando si atụ anya: usoro ọ bụla na-enye ntọala maka nke ọzọ. Rịgoo site n'ịdị ukwuu Ụwa ruo eluigwe a na-ahụ anya.
igbo.compared_sun_angle_in_two_cities_first: O ji akụkụ anyanwụ na obodo abụọ tụnyere. Ntụle mbụ nke Ụwa.
igbo.hipparchus_150_bce_used_earth_s_shadow: Hipparchus (~150 TOA) ji ndò Ụwa n'Ọnwa n'oge nchupụ tụọ anya.
igbo.defines_the_astronomical_unit_modern_r: Ọ na-akọwa nkeji kpakpando. Radar ọgbara ọhụrụ ziri ezi ruo mita.
igbo.kepler_s_third_law_distance_from_orbit: Iwu nke atọ nke Kepler: anya site n'ogologo oge okirikiri. Ụgbọ elu mbara igwe akwadola ya ugbu a.
igbo.earth_s_orbit_gives_2_au_baseline_star: Okirikiri Ụwa na-enye ntọala 2 AU. Kpakpando na-adị ka ọ na-agagharị kwa oge.
igbo.pulsation_period_reveals_true_brightne: Ogologo oge nkụda na-egosi ezigbo ìhè. Tụnyere ìhè a na-ahụ anya maka anya.
igbo.same_cepheid_method_extended_to_other_: Otu usoro Cepheid a gbatịrị ruo galaxy ndị ọzọ. Hubble gosipụtara na Andromeda dị n'èzí galaxy anyị na 1923.
igbo.more_distant_galaxies_are_receding_fas: Galaxy ndị ka dị anya na-ala azụ ngwa ngwa. v = H × d na-enye anya.
igbo.cosmic_microwave_background_is_light_f: Ndabere Microwave Eluigwe bụ ìhè site na ijeri afọ 13.8 gara aga, nke mgbasawanye gbatịrị.
igbo.light_from_receding_objects_redshifts_: Ìhè site n'ihe na-ala azụ na-agbanwe uhie; site n'ihe na-abịaru nso, na-agbanwe anụnụ. Otu a ka anyị si atụ anya mbara igwe + mara na eluigwe na-agbasawanye.
igbo.how_much_of_a_planet_s_incoming_sunlig: Ole n'ime ìhè anyanwụ na-abanye na mbaraụwa ka a na-egosipụta ma ọ bụ mịkọrọ? Nke a na-akwalite okpomọkụ ụwa niile.
igbo.albedo_fraction_of_light_reflected_ice: Albedo = akụkụ ìhè e gosipụtara. Mmiri oyi + ígwé ojii na-egosipụta nke ukwuu (albedo elu); ala gbara ọchịchịrị + mmiri na-amịkọrọ (albedo ala). Ngosipụta karịa = mbaraụwa dị jụụ. Nke a bụ nzaghachi mmiri oyi-albedo nke na-akwalite oge mmiri oyi.
igbo.13_8_billion_years_compressed_into_a_s: Ijeri afọ 13.8 a pịkọtara n'otu slaịda. Gagharịa site n'otu ebe ruo taa.
igbo.spacetime_matter_compressed_to_a_point: A pịkọtara oge-ohere + ihe n'otu ebe
igbo.universe_expands_by_10_in_a_fraction_o: Eluigwe gbasara 10²⁶ n'ime obere akụkụ nke sekọnd
igbo.quarks_bind_into_protons_and_neutrons: Quark na-ejikọta ka ọ bụrụ proton na neutron
igbo.first_atomic_nuclei_hydrogen_helium_li: Etiti atọm mbụ: haịdrojen, hịlium, lithium
igbo.first_atoms_cmb_photons_released: Atọm mbụ; e wepụtara photon CMB
igbo.no_stars_mostly_neutral_hydrogen_dark_: Enweghị kpakpando; ihe ka ọtụtụ bụ haịdrojen na ihe ojii
igbo.population_iii_stars_massive_short_liv: Kpakpando Ọgbọ III: buru ibu, ndụ dị mkpụmkpụ
igbo.most_galaxies_assembled_star_formation: A chịkọtara ọtụtụ galaxy; mmepụta kpakpando ruru elu
igbo.expansion_accelerating_due_to_dark_ene: Mgbasawanye na-agba ọsọ n'ihi ike ojii
igbo.the_universe_is_13_8_billion_years_old: Eluigwe dị ijeri afọ 13.8. Ọ malitere na ịdị arọ na okpomọkụ na-enweghị ngwụcha, wee gbasaa ma jụọ oyi. Galaxy mepụtara na ijeri afọ 1, Anyanwụ anyị na ijeri 9, anyị nọkwa ebe a na ijeri 13.8.
igbo.click_incoming_asteroids_before_they_r: Pịa asteroid na-abịa tupu ha erute Ụwa. Dịka nchekwa mbaraụwa nke ọrụ DART NASA.
igbo.real_nasa_program_dart_double_asteroid: Ezigbo mmemme NASA: DART (Double Asteroid Redirection Test) gbanwere okirikiri Dimorphos nke ọma na 2022. Ụlọ Ọrụ Nhazi Nchekwa Mbaraụwa na-eso ihe 30,000+ dị nso na Ụwa.
igbo.four_galaxy_morphologies_spirals_like_: Ụdị galaxy anọ. Ndị na-agbagharị dị ka nke anyị na-egosi ogwe aka na-eso mmepụta kpakpando. Ndị ụdị àkwá bụ ochie, ndị na-enweghị usoro bụ ọgbaghara.
igbo.bigger_aperture_gathers_more_light_res: Oghere buru ibu na-anakọta ìhè karịa + na-egosi nkọwa dị nro. Nnukwu ime adịghị mkpa dị ka i chere.
igbo.aperture_matters_more_than_magnificati: Oghere dị mkpa karịa nnukwu ime! Nnukwu enyo na-anakọta ìhè karịa + na-egosi nkọwa dị nro. Nnukwu ime karịrị ihe dịka 20x kwa cm nke oghere na-eme ka ọ gbaa ọchịchịrị. Enyo mita 6.5 nke JWST na-amụ galaxy site na narị nde afọ mbụ ole na ole ka Nnukwu Mgbawa gasịrị.
igbo.drag_the_altitude_slider_up_through_ea: Dọrọ slaịda ịdị elu gaa n'elu site n'ikuku Ụwa. Nrụgide na-ada, okpomọkụ na-agbanwe, kemistri na-agbanwekwa akwa n'akwa.
igbo.weather_happens_here_temperature_decre: Ihu igwe na-eme ebe a. Okpomọkụ na-ebelata site n'ịdị elu.
igbo.ozone_layer_absorbs_uv_temperature_inc: Akwa ozone na-amịkọrọ UV. Okpomọkụ na-abawanye site n'ịdị elu.
igbo.meteors_burn_up_here_coldest_layer_90_: Meteor na-ere ọkụ ebe a. Akwa kacha jụọ oyi (-90°C).
igbo.iss_orbits_here_400km_aurora_glow_very: ISS na-agba gburugburu ebe a (400km). Ìhè ndịda na-egbuke. Ikuku dị mkpa nke ukwuu mana ọ dị ọkụ.
igbo.boundary_to_space_air_escapes_to_space: Oke ruo mbara igwe. Ikuku na-agbapụ gaa mbara igwe.
igbo.galileo_s_1610_observations_venus_goes: Nlele Galileo nke 1610: Venus na-agafe ọkwa. Nke a gosipụtara na Venus na-agba Anyanwụ gburugburu, ọ bụghị Ụwa.
igbo.galileo_s_1610_discovery_venus_has_pha: Nchọpụta Galileo nke 1610: Venus nwere ọkwa dị ka Ọnwa
igbo.in_1610_galileo_observed_venus_through: Na 1610 Galileo lere Venus anya site na teleskop ya wee hụ na ọ na-agafe ọkwa — dị ka Ọnwa. Nke a bụ ihe àmà na Venus na-agba Anyanwụ gburugburu, ọ bụghị Ụwa. Usoro Ptolemy nke ụwa-etiti apụghị ịkọwa Venus zuru oke. Nnukwu ihe àmà maka usoro anyanwụ-etiti nke Copernicus.
igbo.a_magnetic_field_deflects_solar_wind_p: Ubi magnet na-achụpụ ifufe anyanwụ + na-echebe ikuku. Mars tụfuru ha abụọ; ọ bụ ya mere o ji tọgbọrọ n'efu.
igbo.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_most_s: Ubi magnet Ụwa na-achụpụ ọtụtụ ifufe anyanwụ, na-echebe ikuku + ndụ. Mars tụfuru ubi magnet ya ~ijeri afọ 4 gara aga wee tụfuo ikuku ya nwayọọ nwayọọ. Jupiter nwere ubi kacha sie ike na usoro anyanwụ.
igbo.switch_between_size_and_distance_views: Gbanwee n'etiti nlele ịdị ukwuu na nke anya. Enweghị ike igosi ha abụọ n'ezigbo ọtụtụ n'otu oge — otu a ka mbara igwe si tọgbọrọ n'efu.
igbo.true_scales_are_hard_to_show_simultane: O siri ike igosi ezigbo ọtụtụ n'otu oge. Ọ bụrụ na Ụwa bụ agwa, Anyanwụ ga-abụ bọọlụ osimiri dị ụkwụ 200 n'anya. Ọ bụrụ na anya dị n'ezigbo ọtụtụ, mbaraụwa ga-aghọ ntụpọ a na-adịghị ahụ anya. Ọtụtụ eserese na-emekọ.
igbo.thrust_to_slow_your_descent_land_softe: Kwalite iji belata nrịdata gị. Rute nwayọọ karịa 2.5 m/s ma ọ bụ daa. Chịkwaa mmanụ — o zughị maka ịkwụsị n'efu.
igbo.apollo_11_nearly_ran_out_of_fuel_durin: Apollo 11 fọrọ nke nta ka mmanụ gwụ ya n'oge nrịdata ọnwa. Neil Armstrong ji aka gbanwee ọkwọ ụgbọ elu akpaghị aka iji chọta ebe ọdịda dị mma. Ọdịda mere na mmanụ ~sekọnd 25 fọdụrụ.
igbo.pick_a_destination_see_how_long_light_: Họrọ ebe ị na-aga + hụ oge ọ na-ewe ìhè iru ya. Karịa usoro anyanwụ, anya na-abụ ihe ịtụnanya.
igbo.light_moves_300_000_km_s_we_see_distan: Ìhè na-aga 300,000 km/s. Anyị na-ahụ ihe dị anya dị ka ha dị mgbe ìhè hapụrụ ha. Anyanwụ anyị na-ahụ dị nkeji 8; Proxima Centauri dị afọ 4. Galaxy Andromeda dị nde afọ 2.5.
igbo.where_exactly_does_the_sun_rise_set_it: Ebee ka Anyanwụ si awa + daa? Ọ dabere na latitud gị + ụbọchị. Nwaa Maine na Okirikiri Arctic.
igbo.sun_path_depends_on_latitude_season_at: Ụzọ anyanwụ dabere na latitud + oge. N'equator, anyanwụ na-aga kpọmkwem n'elu isi. N'Okirikiri Arctic, anyanwụ etiti abalị na solstice okpomọkụ + abalị isi na solstice oyi. Portland nke Maine: anyanwụ etiti okpomọkụ dị elu; n'etiti oyi, anyanwụ na-agafe ebe eluigwe na ala zutere naanị ntakịrị.
igbo.some_moons_may_host_life_europa_encela: Ụfọdụ ọnwa nwere ike inwe ndụ: Europa + Enceladus + Titan + Ganymede nwere oke osimiri n'okpuru elu. Ọrụ na-aga n'ihu na-achọ ugbu a.
igbo.subsurface_ocean_has_2_water_of_earth_: Oke osimiri n'okpuru elu nwere mmiri okpukpu 2× nke oke osimiri Ụwa. Ọnụ ọkụ mmiri nwere ike ịdị n'ala oke osimiri. Ọrụ JUICE + Europa Clipper na-aga n'ihu.
igbo.cassini_discovered_geysers_spraying_wa: Cassini chọtara isi iyi na-agbasa mmiri + ihe organic + haịdrojen + silica. Kemistri uzuoku na-egosi ihe + isi iyi ike nwere ike ịkwado ndụ.
igbo.thick_atmosphere_of_n2_ch4_lakes_of_li: Ikuku gbara ọkpụrụkpụ nke N2 + CH4. Ọdọ mmiri metan mmiri n'elu. Oke osimiri mmiri-amọnia n'okpuru. Ndụ nwere ike ịdị mana dị iche nke ukwuu.
igbo.largest_moon_subsurface_ocean_confirme: Ọnwa kacha ukwuu. Ihe àmà Hubble siri ike maka oke osimiri n'okpuru elu. Ọrụ JUICE ga-amụ ya.
igbo.oldest_visible_surface_in_solar_system: Elu kacha ochie a na-ahụ anya na usoro anyanwụ. Oke osimiri n'okpuru elu nwere ike ịdị. Radiation dị obere karịa ọnwa Jupiter ndị ọzọ.
igbo.most_volcanically_active_body_in_solar: Ahụ kacha nwee ugwu mgbawa na usoro anyanwụ. Ugwu mgbawa 400+ na-arụ ọrụ. Ikuku sulfur dioxide. A gaghị ebi na ya.
igbo.what_would_it_take_to_make_mars_liveab: Gịnị ka a ga-eme ka Mars bụrụ ebe a ga-ebi? Hazie gas ụlọ enyo, mgbaze mmiri oyi, na mkpuchi osisi — lee ka Mars si agbanwe.
igbo.terraforming_mars_would_take_thousands: Ịgbanwe Mars ga-ewe puku afọ. Achọrọ: ime ka ikuku gbaa ọkpụrụkpụ (gas ụlọ enyo), ikpo elu ọkụ (na-agbaze mmiri oyi), iwebata osisi (ọksijen). Ọmụmụ NASA na-egosi na nchekwa CO2 nke Mars ugbu a dị mkpa nke ukwuu maka mgbanwe n'enweghị nnukwu mbubata. Ọ ka bụ ihe akụkọ sayensị n'ihe ka ọtụtụ.
igbo.hubble_stared_at_an_empty_patch_of_sky: Hubble lere otu ebe efu nke eluigwe anya ụbọchị 10 wee chọta galaxy 3000 dị anya. Lee nso + iberibe ọ bụla na-agbaji agbaji bụ galaxy.
igbo.each_fuzzy_blob_is_a_galaxy_of_100_bil: Iberibe ọ bụla na-agbaji agbaji bụ galaxy nke nde ruo narị ijeri kpakpando
igbo.in_1995_hubble_pointed_at_a_tiny_dark_: Na 1995, Hubble lere obere ebe gbara ọchịchịrị nke eluigwe anya ụbọchị 10. Nsonaazụ: galaxy 3000 dị anya n'otu foto. JWST emeela ka nke a dịkwuo omimi, na-amụ galaxy site na narị nde afọ mbụ ole na ole ka Nnukwu Mgbawa gasịrị.
igbo.hotter_stars_look_bluer_cooler_stars_r: Kpakpando dị ọkụ na-adị ka anụnụ; kpakpando jụrụ oyi na-acha uhie. A na-ekewa kpakpando OBAFGKM site n'ụdị spectrum.
igbo.red_dwarf_coolest_most_common_stars_75: Kpakpando uhie nta — kpakpando kacha jụọ oyi + kacha baa ụba (pasent 75 nke kpakpando niile)
igbo.orange_dwarf_quieter_than_sun_longer_l: Kpakpando nta odo odo — dị jụụ karịa Anyanwụ, na-ebi ogologo
igbo.blue_hottest_rarest_stars_lifespans_on: Anụnụ — kpakpando kacha ọkụ + kacha dị ụkọ, ndụ ha bụ naanị nde afọ
igbo.star_color_temperature_astronomy_mnemo: Agba kpakpando = okpomọkụ. Ihe ncheta ndị ọkà mmụta kpakpando maka usoro spectrum OBAFGKM (kacha ọkụ ruo kacha jụọ oyi): 'Oh Be A Fine Girl/Guy, Kiss Me.' Kpakpando dị ọkụ buru ibu karịa + na-egbuke karịa + ndụ ha dị mkpụmkpụ.
igbo.why_does_the_moon_always_show_the_same: Gịnị mere Ọnwa ji na-egosi otu ihu mgbe niile? Ike mmiri mmiri belatara ntụgharị ya. Lee ka anya + ibu si emetụta oge njikọ.
igbo.tidal_forces_gradually_slow_a_moon_s_r: Ike mmiri mmiri na-ebelata ntụgharị ọnwa nwayọọ nwayọọ ruo mgbe ọ dabara na ogologo okirikiri ya. Ọnwa anyị jikọtara: otu ihu na-eche Ụwa mgbe niile. Mercury nọ na njikọ 3:2 na Anyanwụ (ọ jikọtaghị nke ọma).
igbo.click_each_crater_real_planetary_scien: Pịa olulu ọ bụla. Ezigbo ndị ọkà mmụta sayensị mbaraụwa na-agụ olulu iji mata afọ elu — olulu karịa = ochie karịa.
igbo.click_craters_to_count_them: 🔍 Pịa olulu ka ị gụọ ha
igbo.crater_counting_is_how_scientists_dete: Ịgụ olulu bụ ka ndị ọkà mmụta sayensị si ekpebi afọ elu mbaraụwa. Olulu karịa = elu ochie karịa. Ugwu Ọnwa nwere ọtụtụ olulu (ochie nke ukwuu); maria bụ mmiri lava ka ọhụrụ.
igbo.mass_curves_spacetime_drag_mass_watch_: Ibu na-agbagọ oge-ohere. Dọrọ ibu + lee ka olulu si emikpu. Kwaa bọọlụ ka ị hụ ka ọ si adaba n'ime.
igbo.einstein_s_general_relativity_says_mas: Relativity izugbe Einstein na-ekwu na ibu na-agbagọ oge-ohere. Ihe anaghị enwe mmetụta ike — ha na-eso ụzọ kacha mkpụmkpụ site na jiometrị gbagọrọ agbagọ. Nke a bụ ike ndọda. Oghere ojii na-agbagọ oge-ohere nke ukwuu nke na ọbụna ìhè anaghị agbapụ.
igbo.three_main_asteroid_types_c_s_m_mining: Ụdị asteroid atọ bụ isi: C, S, M. Ụlọ ọrụ ngwuputa na-ele ụdị M anya maka ígwè + platinum.
igbo.most_common_75_dark_primitive_water_ri: Kacha baa ụba (pasent 75). Gbara ọchịchịrị, nke mbụ, jupụtara na mmiri. A na-achọta ha na belt èzí.
igbo.stony_17_lighter_made_of_silicate_mine: Nkume (pasent 17). Dị fọrọ, e ji mineral silicate + ígwè mee ya. A na-achọta ha na belt ime.
igbo.metal_rich_8_mostly_iron_nickel_possib: Jupụtara na ígwè (pasent 8). Ihe ka ọtụtụ bụ ígwè + nickel. O nwere ike ịbụ site n'etiti mbaraụwa mbụ gbajiri agbaji. Ebumnuche ngwuputa.
igbo.light_from_380_000_years_after_the_big: Ìhè site n'afọ 380,000 ka Nnukwu Mgbawa gasịrị. Obere ọdịiche bụ mkpụrụ galaxy ọ bụla.
igbo.temperature_fluctuations_of_0_0001_see: Mgbanwe okpomọkụ nke ihe dịka pasent 0.001 — mkpụrụ nhazi niile
igbo.the_cmb_is_leftover_light_from_380_000: CMB bụ ìhè fọdụrụ site n'afọ 380,000 ka Nnukwu Mgbawa gasịrị. Obere ọdịiche okpomọkụ na-egosi ebe ihe dị ntakịrị arọ. Ebe ndị ahụ arọ tolitere ka ha bụrụ galaxy niile + kpakpando anyị na-ahụ taa. Penzias + Wilson chọtara ha n'amaghị ama na 1965 (Ihe Nrite Nobel 1978).
igbo.saturn_s_rings_are_99_water_ice_in_tri: Mgbanaka Saturn bụ pasent 99 mmiri oyi n'ime iberibe nde nde. Ha nwere ike ịbụ naanị nde afọ 100.
igbo.saturn_s_rings_are_mostly_water_ice_pa: Mgbanaka Saturn bụ mkpụrụ mmiri oyi n'ihe ka ọtụtụ site na mkpụrụ ájá ruo iberibe ha nhata ụlọ. Ha gbatịrị kilomita 282,000 mana ọkpụrụkpụ ha dị < kilomita 1. O yikarịrị ka e mepụtara ha site n'ọnwa gbajiri agbaji ~nde afọ 100 gara aga — ha ka dị ọhụrụ!
igbo.pick_a_core_surface_atmosphere_and_lif: Họrọ etiti, elu, ikuku, na ndụ. Lee ụdị ụwa i mepụtara.
igbo.pulsars_are_spinning_neutron_stars_wit: Pulsar bụ kpakpando neutron na-agba gburugburu nwere ìhè magnet. Ụwa na-ahụ nkụda naanị mgbe ìhè gafere.
igbo.a_pulsar_is_a_rapidly_rotating_neutron: Pulsar bụ kpakpando neutron na-agba gburugburu ngwa ngwa. Isi magnet ya na-ewepụta ìhè radiation. Anyị na-ahụ nkụda naanị mgbe ìhè gafere anyị — dị ka ụlọ ọkụ osimiri. Ụfọdụ na-akụ ugboro 700 kwa sekọnd. Jocelyn Bell Burnell chọtara nke mbụ na 1967.
igbo.stream_of_charged_particles_from_sun_h: Iyi mkpụrụ nwere ọkụ eletrik site n'Anyanwụ, na-akụ Ụwa. Ifufe siri ike = ìhè ndịda karịa + nsogbu GPS.
igbo.solar_wind_is_a_stream_of_charged_part: Ifufe anyanwụ bụ iyi mkpụrụ nwere ọkụ eletrik (proton + electron n'ihe ka ọtụtụ) nke na-esi n'Anyanwụ na-asọ mgbe niile. Ọsọ dị n'etiti 250-800 km/s. Oke ifufe siri ike na-eweta ìhè ndịda + nwere ike imebi GPS + ọkụ eletrik. Ihe omume Carrington 1859: telegraph nwara ọkụ ma gbaa ọkụ.
igbo.the_iss_orbits_earth_every_90_minutes_: ISS na-agba Ụwa gburugburu kwa nkeji 90. Mgbe ụfọdụ n'ìhè, mgbe ụfọdụ na ndò Ụwa.
igbo.the_iss_orbits_400_km_up_at_17_500_mph: ISS na-agba gburugburu kilomita 400 n'elu na 17,500 mph (28,000 km/h). Ọ na-emecha otu okirikiri kwa nkeji 90 — ya mere ndị na-eje mbara igwe na-ahụ ọwụwa anyanwụ + ọdịda anyanwụ ugboro 16 kwa ụbọchị. ISS bụ ihe kacha ukwuu ndị mmadụ wuru na mbara igwe.
igbo.voyager_1_2_launched_1977_they_are_now: E bupụrụ Voyager 1 + 2 na 1977. Ha nọ ugbu a na mbara igwe n'etiti kpakpando; Voyager 1 gafere heliopause na 2012, Voyager 2 na 2018.
igbo.voyagers_1_2_launched_1977_to_study_ou: E bupụrụ Voyager 1 + 2 na 1977 iji mụọ mbaraụwa èzí. Ha abụọ gafere heliopause (oke ifufe anyanwụ) na 2012 + 2018 — ugbu a ha nọ na mbara igwe n'etiti kpakpando. Nke ọ bụla na-ebu Ndekọ Ọlaedo nwere ekele + egwu maka ndị ọbịa ọ bụla ga-achọta ha.
igbo.mercury_passes_in_front_of_the_sun_eve: Mercury na-agafe n'ihu Anyanwụ kwa afọ ole na ole. Lee ka ọ na-agafe — mana naanị site na nzacha anyanwụ kwesịrị ekwesị.
igbo.watch_with_proper_solar_filter_only_ne: Lee naanị site na nzacha anyanwụ KWESỊRỊ EKWESỊ — ELELA anya ozugbo!
igbo.a_transit_happens_when_mercury_or_venu: Ngafe na-eme mgbe Mercury (ma ọ bụ Venus) gafere n'etiti Ụwa + Anyanwụ. Ọ na-adị ka obere ntụpọ ojii n'Anyanwụ. Ngafe Mercury na-esote: Nọvemba 13, 2032. Ngafe Venus na-esote: Disemba 2117 — ọ gaghị eme ọzọ ruo 2125.
igbo.l_on_foucault_1851_proved_earth_rotate: Léon Foucault gosipụtara na 1851 na Ụwa na-agba gburugburu site na nnukwu pendulum. Ọnọdụ ịmagharị ya na-agba ngwa ngwa n'isi.
igbo.l_on_foucault_1851_demonstrated_earth_: Léon Foucault gosipụtara ntụgharị Ụwa na 1851 site na nnukwu pendulum. Ọnọdụ ịmagharị ya na-adị ka ọ na-agba gburugburu n'ihi na Ụwa na-atụgharị n'okpuru ya. N'isi: awa 24. N'equator: ọ dịghị eme. Na Maine: ~awa 34.
igbo.saturn_s_north_pole_has_a_perfect_hexa: Isi ugwu Saturn nwere oke ifufe akụkụ isii zuru oke nke obosara ya bụ kilomita 30,000. Voyager chọtara ya na 1981.
igbo.saturn_s_hexagonal_pole_storm: Oke Ifufe Isi Saturn Akụkụ Isii
igbo.persistent_feature_30_000_km_wide_5_ea: Njirimara na-adịgide nke obosara ya bụ kilomita 30,000 — karịa okpukpu 2 obosara Ụwa
igbo.saturn_has_a_perfect_hexagonal_storm_a: Saturn nwere oke ifufe akụkụ isii zuru oke n'isi ugwu ya — Voyager buru ụzọ sere ya (1981), Cassini kwadoro ya. Akụkụ isii ahụ nwere obosara kilomita 30,000 ma na-adịgide. Gịnị mere akụkụ isii? Ụdị ifufe jet ikuku + ebili mmiri Rossby.
igbo.the_original_clock_as_the_sun_arcs_acr: Elekere mbụ. Ka Anyanwụ na-agafe eluigwe, mkpịsị ahụ na-atụ ndò na-agba gburugburu nke na-egosi awa.
igbo.sundials_predate_clocks_by_millennia_a: Elekere anyanwụ buru elekere ụzọ puku afọ. Ka Anyanwụ na-agafe eluigwe, ndò mkpịsị ahụ na-agba gburugburu. Ndị Ijipt oge ochie, ndị Grik, ndị Rome, ndị China niile wuru elekere anyanwụ ziri ezi. Ndị ọgbara ọhụrụ ga-emezi maka oge nchekwa ìhè ehihie + nhata oge.
igbo.80_galaxies_span_10_million_light_year: Galaxy 80 gbasara afọ ìhè nde 10 gburugburu anyị. Ụzọ Mmiri Ara + Andromeda nwere ike ikukọ n'ihe dịka ijeri afọ 4-5 — ọmụmụ 2025 tụrụ ohere ahụ ihe dịka 50/50.
igbo.2_5_mly_away_heading_toward_us: Mly 2.5 n'anya — ọ na-abịa n'ebe anyị nọ!
igbo.160k_ly_satellite_of_milky_way: ly 160k — satelaịtị nke Ụzọ Mmiri Ara
igbo.25k_ly_closest_to_mw: ly 25k — kacha nso na Ụzọ Mmiri Ara
igbo.local_group_80_galaxies_in_10_million_: Ìgwè Mpaghara — galaxy ~80 n'ime afọ ìhè nde 10
igbo.our_local_group_has_80_galaxies_domina: Ìgwè Mpaghara anyị nwere galaxy ~80 nke Ụzọ Mmiri Ara + Andromeda na-achị. Andromeda na-abịaru nso na 110 km/s — nkukọ nwere ike ime n'ihe dịka ijeri afọ 4-5. Ọ bụrụ na o mee: nnukwu galaxy Milkomeda.
igbo.what_size_asteroid_kills_which_level_o: Asteroid ịdị ukwuu ole na-egbu ọkwa ndụ ole? Tụnyere site na obere nkume ruo onye gburu dinosaur.
igbo.atmospheric_entry_destroys_most_rocks_: Ọnụ ụzọ ikuku na-ebibi ọtụtụ nkume < 5m. Chelyabinsk 2013 (20m) gbajiri windo mana o nweghị olulu. Tunguska 1908 (50m) kwatuo 2000km² nke ọhịa. Chicxulub 66Ma (10km) gburu dinosaur.
igbo.a_cme_blasts_billions_of_tons_of_plasm: CME na-agbapụta ijeri tọn plasma site n'Anyanwụ. Ụbọchị ole na ole ka o gasịrị, ọ nwere ike ibute ìhè ndịda mara mma + ọdịda GPS.
igbo.a_coronal_mass_ejection_blasts_billion: Mwepụta Ibu Corona na-agbapụta ijeri tọn plasma banye mbara igwe na nde 1-2 mph. Ọ na-ewe ụbọchị 1-5 iru Ụwa. CME siri ike na-ebute oke ifufe magnet, ìhè ndịda na-egbuke, ma nwee ike imebi satelaịtị + ọkụ eletrik.
igbo.cepheids_pulse_on_a_regular_cycle_thei: Cepheid na-akụ n'okirikiri kwa oge. Ogologo oge ha na-egosi ezigbo ìhè ha — ihe ọtụtụ eluigwe.
igbo.cepheid_variables_pulse_on_a_regular_c: Kpakpando Cepheid na-agbanwe na-akụ n'okirikiri kwa oge. Ogologo oge ha metụtara ozugbo ìhè ha n'ime onwe ha (Henrietta Leavitt 1908). Ndị ọkà mmụta kpakpando na-atụ ogologo oge + eji ya ekpebi ezigbo ìhè + anya.
igbo.comet_orbit_drawer: ☄ Onye Na-ese Okirikiri Kpakpando Nwere Ọdụ
igbo.orbits_range_from_circles_to_long_elli: Okirikiri na-esite na gburugburu ruo ụdị àkwá ogologo. Hazie mgbagọ ka ị see ụzọ yiri mbaraụwa ma ọ bụ yiri kpakpando nwere ọdụ.
igbo.orbital_eccentricity_goes_from_0_perfe: Mgbagọ okirikiri na-esite na 0 (okirikiri zuru oke) ruo 1 (mgbapụ parabolic). Mbaraụwa fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ okirikiri. Kpakpando nwere ọdụ nwere ụdị àkwá nke ukwuu — ha na-abịaru Anyanwụ nso + gaa n'ebe dị anya na usoro èzí. Okirikiri hyperbolic (e>1) pụtara otu ngafe naanị site na usoro anyanwụ.
igbo.earth_s_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelen: Ikuku Ụwa na-egbochi ọtụtụ ogologo ebili mmiri. Ìhè a na-ahụ anya, redio, na ụfọdụ windo infrared na-erute ala.
igbo.visible_light_radio_waves_penetrate_th: ✔ Ìhè a na-ahụ anya, ebili mmiri redio, na ụfọdụ infrared na-erute ala

igbo.excited_gas_10000_k: Gas kpalitere: ọ na-abụkarị ihe dịka 10,000 K

igbo.spectra_life_paths_note: Ihe atụ ndị a abụghị otu usoro oge: kpakpando yiri Anyanwụ nwere ike ịghọ nnukwu kpakpando uhie na nebula mbaraụwa, ebe supernova ụdị II na-akwụsị ndụ nnukwu kpakpando.
igbo.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_watch_when_i: Ụwa na-agba gburugburu 15° kwa awa. Lee mgbe ọ bụ ehihie na Tokyo, mgbe ọwụwa anyanwụ ruru Portland.
igbo.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_utc_coordina: Ụwa na-agba gburugburu 15° kwa awa. UTC (Oge Ụwa Niile A Haziri) bụ ntụaka ụwa niile. Mpaghara oge na-adị iche site na ±awa. Portland nke Maine bụ UTC-5 (EST) ma ọ bụ UTC-4 (EDT). N'ụwa niile, ọkara Ụwa nọ n'ìhè ebe ọkara nọ n'abalị.
igbo.click_through_12_astronomy_facts_that_: Pịa gafee eziokwu nyocha kpakpando 12 nke na-agbagha echiche.
igbo.textbook_diagrams_lie_the_moon_is_much: Eserese akwụkwọ na-agha ụgha. Ọnwa dị anya karịa ka e sere ya. Lee ezigbo ọtụtụ.
igbo.moon_too_big_close: Ọnwa (buru ibu + dị nso nke ukwuu)
igbo.most_textbooks_draw_the_moon_too_big_t: Ọtụtụ akwụkwọ na-ese Ọnwa ka o buru ibu nke ukwuu + dị nso nke ukwuu. Eziokwu: obosara Ọnwa bụ 1/4 nke Ụwa, anya ruo Ọnwa bụ ~obosara Ụwa 30. Ìhè na-ewe sekọnd 1.3 iji mee njem ahụ.
igbo.jupiter_has_the_shortest_day_10_hr_ven: Jupiter nwere ụbọchị kacha mkpụmkpụ (awa 10). Venus nwere nke kacha ogologo (ụbọchị Ụwa 243!).
igbo.day_length_across_the_solar_system_log: Ogologo ụbọchị n'ofe Usoro Anyanwụ (ọtụtụ log)
igbo.jupiter_spins_fast_venus_rotates_slowe: Jupiter na-agba gburugburu ngwa ngwa. Venus na-agba gburugburu nwayọọ karịa afọ ya.
igbo.gas_giants_spin_fast_because_of_how_th: Nnukwu mbaraụwa gas na-agba gburugburu ngwa ngwa n'ihi ka e si mepụta ha. Venus na-agba gburugburu kacha nwayọọ, ikekwe n'ihi mmiri mmiri anyanwụ + nrụgide ikuku gbara ọkpụrụkpụ. Ụwa na-ebelata site na ~milisekọnd 1.7 kwa narị afọ n'ihi ike ndọda Ọnwa.
igbo.total_eclipses_cover_narrow_strips_the: Nchupụ zuru oke na-ekpuchi eriri warara. Ụzọ nchupụ 2024 gafere ugwu Maine.
igbo.april_8_2024_total_solar_eclipse_path: Ụzọ Nchupụ Anyanwụ Zuru Oke nke Eprel 8, 2024
igbo.total_solar_eclipses_only_happen_along: Nchupụ anyanwụ zuru oke na-eme naanị n'ụzọ warara ~kilomita 100-150 n'obosara. Nchupụ Eprel 8, 2024 gafere ugwu Maine — ọtụtụ ndị Maine gara ugwu ka ha hụ nchupụ zuru oke. Nchupụ zuru oke na-esote a ga-ahụ site na Maine: Mee 1, 2079.
igbo.sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_13_8_billion_y: Kalenda Eluigwe nke Sagan: ijeri afọ 13.8 n'otu afọ. Ndị mmadụ rutere na sekọnd ikpeazụ.
igbo.carl_sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_compresse: Kalenda Eluigwe nke Carl Sagan: ọ na-apịkọta ijeri afọ 13.8 n'otu afọ. Nnukwu Mgbawa = Jenụwarị 1. Ugbu a = etiti abalị Disemba 31. Ndị mmadụ pụtara na sekọnd ikpeazụ. Mmepe obodo dị na obere akụkụ ikpeazụ nke sekọnd.
igbo.how_many_alien_civilizations_adjust_ea: Obodo ndị ọbịa ole? Hazie ihe ọ bụla a na-amaghị + hụ azịza.
igbo.in_our_milky_way_galaxy_at_any_time: n'ime Galaxy Ụzọ Mmiri Ara anyị n'oge ọ bụla
igbo.ne_habitable_per_system: ne: Ọnụọgụ a ga-ebi kwa usoro
igbo.frank_drake_1961_estimating_other_civi: Frank Drake 1961: ịtụ atụmatụ obodo ndị ọzọ. A maghị ọtụtụ ihe — azịza site na <1 (naanị anyị) ruo nde. Ọ na-egosi ihe anyị na-amaghị karịa inye azịza. Hazie slaịda ka ị hụ ka nsonaazụ si adị mfe ịgbanwe.
igbo.dozen_biggest_best_telescopes_hubble_j: Teleskop iri na abụọ kacha ukwuu + kacha mma: Hubble, JWST, Keck, VLT, ALMA, na ihe ha na-ele anya.
igbo.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_30_year_: Teleskop mbara igwe anya/UV/IR. Ọrụ afọ 30+.
igbo.infrared_space_telescope_at_l2_lagrang: Teleskop mbara igwe infrared. N'ebe Lagrange L2.
igbo.twin_10m_telescopes_on_mauna_kea_hawai: Teleskop ejima mita 10 na Mauna Kea, Hawaii.
igbo.twin_8m_mauna_kea_cerro_pach_n: Ejima mita 8: Mauna Kea + Cerro Pachón.
igbo.66_antenna_radio_array_chilean_desert: Usoro redio nwere antenna 66, ọzara Chile.
igbo.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_still_op: Teleskop mbara igwe anya/UV/IR. Ọ ka na-arụ ọrụ.
igbo.nasa_x_ray_space_telescope: Teleskop mbara igwe X-ray nke NASA.
igbo.infrared_space_telescope_retired_2020: Teleskop mbara igwe infrared, e zuru ike 2020.
igbo.japanese_8_2m_on_mauna_kea: Nke Japan mita 8.2 na Mauna Kea.
igbo.future_radio_telescope_australia_s_afr: Teleskop redio nke ọdịnihu, Australia + Afrịka Ọdịda Anyanwụ Ndịda.
igbo.a_dozen_of_the_world_s_most_powerful_t: Iri na abụọ n'ime teleskop kacha sie ike n'ụwa. Oghere (cm) bụ obosara enyo mbụ. Oghere buru ibu = ìhè karịa + nkọwa dị nro. Teleskop mbara igwe na-ezere mmebi ikuku.
igbo.massive_stars_live_fast_die_young_adju: Nnukwu kpakpando na-ebi ndụ ngwa ngwa + na-anwụ n'oge. Hazie ibu + hụ ogologo oge kpakpando na-ere ọkụ.
igbo.massive_stars_burn_fuel_fast_lifespan_: Nnukwu kpakpando na-ere mmanụ ngwa ngwa. Ogologo ndụ ∝ M^-2.5. Anyanwụ: Gyr 10 (anyị nọ n'etiti). 10 M☉: naanị Myr 30. Kpakpando uhie nta 0.1 M☉: nde nde afọ.
igbo.track_your_progress_planets_explored_p: Soro mmepe gị: mbaraụwa i nyochara, akara i nwetara, ọrụ i dekọrọ.
igbo.this_tool_features_35_interactive_mini: Ngwá ọrụ a nwere obere ngwá ọrụ 35+ nwere mmekọrịta gbasara nyocha kpakpando, physics, na nchọpụta. Site na ịnwale oghere ojii ruo ịnya ụgbọ ọdịda ọnwa, ị nwere ike inyocha Usoro Anyanwụ na ihe dị n'azụ ya.
igbo.16_milestones_from_ancient_greek_astro: Ihe 16 dị mkpa site na nyocha kpakpando Grik oge ochie ruo JWST. Aha ndị i kwesịrị ịmata.
igbo.a_2300_year_journey_from_aristarchus_t: Njem afọ 2300 site na Aristarchus ruo JWST. Nchọpụta ọ bụla wuru n'elu nke gara aga. Sayensị bụ ọsọ nnyefe — onye ọkà mmụta kpakpando ọ bụla na-eguzo n'ubu ndị buru ya ụzọ.
igbo.compare_spectral_classes_temperature_fin: Tụnyere klas okpomọkụ elu na akara mkpịsị aka spectrum na-akọwa ha.
igbo.spectral_class_size_caution: E mere ka nha gburugburu hà nhata n'ebumnobi. Klas spectrum na-akọwa okpomọkụ na ụdị ahịrị, ọ bụghị obosara ma ọ bụ ìhè naanị ya; klas ìhè V pụtara usoro isi, III pụtara nnukwu kpakpando, I pụtakwara nnukwu kpakpando buru ibu.
igbo.m_class_dwarf_supergiant_note: Otu mkpụrụedemede nwere ike ịgụnye kpakpando dị iche iche: Proxima Centauri bụ kpakpando nta M, ebe Betelgeuse bụ nnukwu kpakpando M buru ibu. Anyanwụ bụ G2 V.
igbo.mars_has_100_thinner_air_made_of_mostl: Mars nwere ikuku dị mkpa ugboro 100× nke bụ CO₂ n'ihe ka ọtụtụ. Tụnyere ihe gas nwere + nrụgide.
igbo.mars_atmosphere_is_100_thinner_than_ea: Ikuku Mars dị mkpa ugboro 100× karịa nke Ụwa. Ihe o nwere: pasent 95 CO₂. Iji kuo ume na Mars ị ga-achọ ọksijen + nrụgide ugboro 100× karịa. Ọ fọrọ nke nta ka naịtrọjen maka nri ala ghara ịdị.
igbo.10_essential_black_hole_terms_event_ho: Okwu oghere ojii 10 dị mkpa: mbara ihe omume, otu ebe, mgbatị spaghetti, radiation Hawking.
igbo.event_horizon_telescope_captured_first: Teleskop Mbara Ihe Omume weere foto mbụ nke oghere ojii M87* (2019) + Sgr A* (2022). Mgbanaka odo odo = ìhè gbagọrọ agbagọ gburugburu bọọlụ ojii ebe ìhè apụghị ịgbapụ.
igbo.five_planets_have_auroras_earth_s_is_g: Mbaraụwa ise nwere ìhè ndịda. Nke Ụwa bụ akwụkwọ ndụ/uhie, nke Jupiter kacha sie ike, nke Mars gbasasịrị.
igbo.green_oxygen_red_atomic_o_blue_nitroge: Akwụkwọ ndụ (ọksijen) + uhie (O atọm) + anụnụ (naịtrọjen). A na-ahụkarị ha nso isi magnet.
igbo.most_powerful_in_solar_system_driven_b: Kacha sie ike na usoro anyanwụ. Ugwu mgbawa Io + ubi magnet Jupiter na-akwalite ya. Ìhè ndịda UV na-adịgide.
igbo.powered_by_solar_wind_less_colorful_th: Ifufe anyanwụ na-akwalite ya. O nweghị agba dị ka nke Ụwa mana o buru ibu. Ọ na-adịru ụbọchị n'otu oge.
igbo.strange_orientation_due_to_98_axial_ti: Ọnọdụ dị iche n'ihi mgbagọ ọkpọkọ nke 98°. O siri ike ise foto ya.
igbo.weak_no_global_magnetic_field_auroras_: Adịghị ike — enweghị ubi magnet zuru ụwa ọnụ. Ìhè ndịda gburugburu magnet fọdụrụ n'akpụkpọ.
igbo.10_missions_that_defined_planetary_exp: Ọrụ 10 nke kọwara nyocha mbaraụwa. Site na Apollo ruo Cassini ruo JWST.
igbo.first_humans_walk_on_moon: Ndị mmadụ mbụ jere ije n'Ọnwa
igbo.first_mars_landers_life_experiments: Ngwá ọdịda Mars mbụ + nnwale ndụ
igbo.nuclear_powered_rover_still_active: Rover nuklia na-akwado, ọ ka na-arụ ọrụ
igbo.first_close_up_of_pluto_arrokoth: Foto nso mbụ nke Pluto + Arrokoth
igbo.sample_return_from_asteroid: Nlaghachi ihe nnwale site na asteroid
igbo.replaced_hubble_for_infrared_deep_fiel: Ọ na-agbakwụnye Hubble na ubi omimi infrared
igbo.brightness_counts_backward_smaller_bri: A na-agụ ìhè n'azụ: obere = na-egbuke karịa. Oke a na-ahụ anya gbasara ọkwa 60.
igbo.faintest_naked_eye: Nke kacha adịghị ike maka anya efu
igbo.magnitudes_count_backward_smaller_brig: A na-agụ ọkwa ìhè N'AZỤ: obere = na-egbuke karịa. Nzọụkwụ ọ bụla nke 5 = ugboro 100× ìhè. Hipparchus mepụtara ya na 130 TOA. Anyanwụ: -26.7. JWST na-ahụ ruo ọkwa 34. Oke: 100^((34-(-26))/5) ≈ ugboro 10^24 adịghị ike karịa Anyanwụ.
igbo.four_ways_astronomers_describe_positio: Ụzọ anọ ndị ọkà mmụta kpakpando si akọwa ebe n'eluigwe.
igbo.star_fixed_coordinates_right_ascension: Koodineeti kpakpando kwụsiri ike. Ịrị elu aka nri (h:m:s) + Mgbagọ (°). A na-eji ya na ndepụta kpakpando.
igbo.observer_centered_altitude_above_horiz: Onye nlele bụ etiti. Ịdị elu (n'elu ebe eluigwe na ala zutere) + Azimuth (site n'ugwu). A na-eji ya duzie teleskop.
igbo.centered_on_sun_earth_plane_used_for_s: Ọ dabere na ọnọdụ Anyanwụ-Ụwa. A na-eji ya maka ihe usoro anyanwụ.
igbo.centered_on_milky_way_plane_used_for_g: Ọ dabere na ọnọdụ Ụzọ Mmiri Ara. A na-eji ya maka ọmụmụ galaxy.
igbo.astronomers_use_multiple_coordinate_sy: Ndị ọkà mmụta kpakpando na-eji ọtụtụ usoro koodineeti. Nke equator bụ nke ụwa niile + ihe na-ejigide otu koodineeti ka Ụwa na-agba gburugburu. Alt-Az na-agbanwe mgbe niile ka Ụwa na-agba gburugburu. Nke galaxy kacha mma maka ịmụ nhazi Ụzọ Mmiri Ara.
igbo.from_1_sun_to_10_22_stars_the_scale_of: Site n'Anyanwụ 1 ruo kpakpando 10^22. Ọtụtụ eluigwe dị ịtụnanya.
igbo.astronomy_operates_on_absurd_scales_ho: Nyocha kpakpando na-arụ ọrụ n'ọtụtụ na-enweghị isi. 'Kpakpando ole?' — karịa mkpụrụ ájá n'ọnụ osimiri ọ bụla na Ụwa. 'Afọ ole?' — ijeri 13.8. Ma ụfọdụ ọnụọgụ (mgbapụ oghere ojii) ka buru ibu.
igbo.36_500_objects_orbit_earth_at_various_: Ihe 36,500 na-agba Ụwa gburugburu n'ịdị elu dị iche iche. Gagharịa slaịda ịdị elu ka ị hụ ihe dị ebe ahụ.
igbo.36_500_tracked_objects_millions_of_fra: Ihe 36,500 a na-eso + nde iberibe na-agba Ụwa gburugburu. Ihe ize ndụ Kessler Syndrome: usoro nkukọ na-eme ka mbara igwe ghara ịba uru. SpaceX Starlink nwere satelaịtị 5000+; ha na-eme atụmatụ ọtụtụ ọzọ.
igbo.every_culture_sees_stories_in_the_star: Ọdịbendị ọ bụla na-ahụ akụkọ na kpakpando. Site na dike Grik ruo Emu N'eluigwe nke ndị nwe ala Australia.
igbo.stories_projected_onto_stars_by_cultur: Akụkọ nke ọdịbendị n'ụwa niile tinyere na kpakpando. Emu N'eluigwe nke ndị nwe ala Australia na-eji ígwé ojii ájá gbara ọchịchịrị. Ndị nduzi Polynesia na-eji kpakpando gafee Pasifik site na ncheta. Nyocha kpakpando bụkwa ịkọ akụkọ.
igbo.5_ways_astronomers_find_planets_around: Ụzọ 5 ndị ọkà mmụta kpakpando si achọta mbaraụwa gburugburu kpakpando ndị ọzọ. Ngafe + Doppler kacha baa ụba.
igbo.watch_a_star_and_look_for_tiny_brightn: Lee kpakpando ma chọọ obere mbelata ìhè mgbe mbaraụwa gafere n'ihu. Kepler + TESS na-eji ya.
igbo.a_planet_s_gravity_makes_its_star_wobb: Ike ndọda mbaraụwa na-eme ka kpakpando ya maa jijiji. Anyị na-ahụ jijiji ahụ dị ka mgbanwe Doppler n'ìhè kpakpando.
igbo.gravity_of_a_passing_star_planet_bends: Ike ndọda nke kpakpando+mbaraụwa na-agafe na-agbagọ ìhè site na kpakpando ka dị anya. Ọ dabereghị n'anya.
igbo.block_out_the_star_s_light_photograph_: Gbochie ìhè kpakpando + sere foto mbaraụwa dị nso. Ọ na-arụ ọrụ naanị maka nnukwu mbaraụwa/ndị dị anya ruo ugbu a.
igbo.variations_in_pulsar_pulses_reveal_orb: Mgbanwe na nkụda pulsar na-egosi ahụ na-agba gburugburu. A chọtara mbaraụwa èzí mbụ n'ụzọ a (1992).
igbo.first_exoplanet_around_a_sun_like_star: Mbaraụwa èzí mbụ gburugburu kpakpando yiri Anyanwụ: 51 Pegasi b (1995). Ugbu a e kwadoro 6,300+. JWST na-eme spectroscopy ikuku na mbaraụwa èzí — na-achọ akara ndụ.
igbo.schedule_of_eclipses_2024_2079_maine_s: Usoro nchupụ 2024-2079. Nchupụ anyanwụ zuru oke na-esote na Maine: 2079.
igbo.total_solar_eclipses_are_rare_about_2_: Nchupụ anyanwụ zuru oke adịghị adị ọtụtụ. Ihe dịka otu kwa ọnwa 18 n'ebe ụfọdụ na Ụwa, mana a na-ahụ nke ọ bụla site na naanị ụzọ warara. A na-ahụ nchupụ ọnwa n'akụkụ abalị dum.
igbo.hubble_s_classification_spirals_ellipt: Nkewa Hubble: ndị na-agbagharị, ndị ụdị àkwá, ndị na-enweghị usoro + ihe niile dị n'etiti.
igbo.tight_arms_big_central_bulge: Ogwe aka jikọtara, nnukwu mkpogharị etiti
igbo.loose_arms_small_bulge: Ogwe aka atọsara atọsa, obere mkpogharị
igbo.nearly_spherical_old: Fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ gburugburu, ochie
igbo.edwin_hubble_classified_galaxies_in_19: Edwin Hubble kewara galaxy na 1936 — 'ndụdụ Hubble.' Ndị na-agbagharị + ndị ụdị àkwá + ndị na-enweghị usoro. Galaxy na-eto site na njikọta — Ụzọ Mmiri Ara nọ n'etiti ndụ ya; njikọta na Andromeda nwere ike ịbịa n'ime ijeri afọ (ọmụmụ 2025 tụrụ ohere ahụ ihe dịka 50/50).
igbo.from_walking_to_light_speed_log_scale_: Site n'ije ije ruo ọsọ ìhè (ọtụtụ log). Voyager 1 bụ ihe kacha anya ndị mmadụ mere ma bụrụkwa otu n'ime ngwá nyocha anyị kacha ngwa ngwa, mana ọ ka dị nwayọọ n'ọtụtụ eluigwe.
igbo.voyager_1_is_the_fastest_object_humans: Voyager 1 dị ọsọ n'ọtụtụ ụgbọ elu mbara igwe ma bụrụkwa ihe kacha anya ndị mmadụ mere ugbu a, ma ọ ga-ewe ihe dịka afọ 80,000 iji rute kpakpando kacha nso. Ìhè na-eme otu njem ahụ n'ime afọ 4.
igbo.watch_stars_form_from_cold_dust_to_hot: Lee ka kpakpando si emepụta site na ájá jụrụ oyi ruo anyanwụ ọkụ. Ọkwa 6 n'ime nde afọ ole na ole.
igbo.stars_are_born_in_clusters_from_giant_: A na-amụ kpakpando n'ìgwè site na nnukwu ígwé ojii molekụlụ. Mkpokọta usoro: nde afọ ole na ole. Ihe atụ ama ama: Nebula Orion (M42), Nebula Ugo (Ogidi Okike), Nebula Tarantula.
igbo.10_of_the_deepest_open_questions_in_co: 10 n'ime ajụjụ kacha miri emi mepere emepe na nyocha eluigwe. Ụfọdụ nwere azịza akụkụ; ụfọdụ bụ ihe omimi zuru oke.
igbo.quick_table_of_planet_properties_diame: Tebụl ngwa ngwa nke àgwà mbaraụwa. Obosara, ike ndọda, ogologo ụbọchị, ọnwa.
igbo.side_by_side_comparison_of_key_planet_: Ntụnyere n'akụkụ ibe ya nke àgwà mbaraụwa dị mkpa. Ụwa = ntọala. Anyanwụ dị ihe dịka ugboro 109 obosara Ụwa (karịa nde ugboro ọtụtụ ya). Jupiter nwere ọnwa 115 a maara. Venus na-agba gburugburu nwayọọ nke na ụbọchị ya karịrị afọ ya.
igbo.40_visual_interactive_mini_tools_made_: Obere ngwá ọrụ 40+ nwere anya + mmekọrịta. E mere ya maka ụmụ akwụkwọ + ndị okenye na-achọ ịmata.
igbo.40_interactive_mini_tools_svg_visualiz: Obere ngwá ọrụ 40+ nwere mmekọrịta, ngosi SVG, na nnwale mmụta.
igbo.from_a_moon_phase_dial_to_a_black_hole: Site na dial ọkwa ọnwa ruo onye ngosi oghere ojii ruo pendulum Foucault, e wuru ngwá ọrụ ọ bụla ka echiche ndị a na-apụghị ịhụ anya bụrụ ihe a na-enwe mmetụta + a na-egwu egwu.
igbo.built_for_k_12_curious_adults_open_all: E wuru ya maka K-12 + ndị okenye na-achọ ịmata. Mepee ngwá ọrụ niile, ma ọ bụ naanị otu — nke ọ bụla na-arụ ọrụ naanị ya.
igbo.part_of_alloflow_stem_lab_built_in_mai: Akụkụ nke AlloFlow STEM Lab. E wuru ya na Maine, USA. E si na NASA, ESA, JAXA, USGS, IAU + isi iyi sayensị ọha nweta data niile. Ojiji mmụta bụ n'efu.
igbo.9_annual_meteor_showers_their_best_vie: Mmiri ozuzo meteor 9 kwa afọ + ụbọchị kacha mma maka ile anya. Mee akara na kalenda gị.
igbo.meteor_showers_happen_when_earth_cross: Mmiri ozuzo meteor na-eme mgbe Ụwa gafere iyi mkpọfu kpakpando nwere ọdụ. Nlele kacha mma: ebe gbara ọchịchịrị, enweghị Ọnwa, mgbe etiti abalị gasịrị. Perseids + Geminids bụ mmiri ozuzo kwa afọ kacha ntụkwasị obi.
igbo.famous_astronomy_quotes: 💬 Okwu Ama Ama Nke Nyocha Kpakpando
igbo.10_quotes_from_astronomers_space_trave: Okwu 10 site na ndị ọkà mmụta kpakpando + ndị njem mbara igwe nke na-egosi ịtụnanya.
igbo.10_things_you_can_spot_tonight_with_ju: Ihe 10 ị nwere ike ịhụ taa n'abalị naanị site n'anya gị ma ọ bụ binocular.
igbo.best_naked_eye_observing_dark_site_awa: Ile anya efu kacha mma: ebe gbara ọchịchịrị (pụọ n'ìhè obodo), Ọnwa n'okpuru ebe eluigwe na ala zutere, anya ndị dabara (nkeji 20-30 n'ọchịchịrị). Ngwa n'efu: Stellarium, SkyView, Star Walk na-enyere aka ịmata ihe ị na-ahụ.
igbo.carl_sagan_s_most_quoted_reflection_a_: Echiche Carl Sagan a kacha ehota. Otu pixel nwere onye ọ bụla anyị maworo.
igbo.from_this_distant_vantage_point_the_ea: "Site n'ebe a dị anya, Ụwa nwere ike ọ gaghị adị mkpa. Mana nye anyị, ọ dị iche. Leekwa ntụpọ ahụ anya ọzọ. Nke ahụ bụ ebe a. Nke ahụ bụ ụlọ. Nke ahụ bụ anyị. N'elu ya ka onye ọ bụla ị hụrụ n'anya, onye ọ bụla ị maara, onye ọ bụla ị nụrụ maka ya, mmadụ ọ bụla dịrị ndụ, biri ndụ ha."
igbo.voyager_1_took_this_photo_of_earth_fro: Voyager 1 sere foto Ụwa a site na kilomita ijeri 6 n'anya na Febụwarị 14, 1990 — arịrịọ site na Carl Sagan. Ụwa bụ otu pixel. Mmadụ ọ bụla n'akụkọ ihe mere eme biri na pixel ahụ.
igbo.8_iconic_deep_sky_objects_star_nurseri: Ihe eluigwe omimi 8 ama ama. Ebe ọmụmụ kpakpando, mkpuchi kpakpando na-anwụ anwụ, ihe fọdụrụ supernova.
igbo.stellar_nursery_24_ly_across_visible_n: Ebe ọmụmụ kpakpando obosara ly 24. A na-ahụ ya n'anya efu na Mma Agha Orion.
igbo.remains_of_supernova_witnessed_in_1054: Ihe fọdụrụ site na supernova a hụrụ na 1054 OA. O nwere pulsar.
igbo.planetary_nebula_in_lyra_glowing_shell: Nebula mbaraụwa na Lyra. Mkpuchi na-egbuke site na kpakpando yiri Anyanwụ nke na-anwụ anwụ.
igbo.home_of_pillars_of_creation_hubble_199: Ụlọ Ogidi Okike (Hubble 1995). Ogidi mmepụta kpakpando.
igbo.complex_planetary_nebula_many_shell_la: Nebula mbaraụwa siri ike. Ọtụtụ akwa mkpuchi site na nkụda.
igbo.closest_planetary_nebula_looks_like_an: Nebula mbaraụwa kacha nso. Ọ na-adị ka anya na mbara igwe.
igbo.in_large_magellanic_cloud_largest_know: Na Nnukwu Ígwé Ojii Magellan. Mpaghara mmepụta kpakpando kacha ukwuu a maara.
igbo.supernova_remnant_8000_years_old_massi: Ihe fọdụrụ supernova dị ~afọ 8000. Nnukwu ọnụ ụzọ na Cygnus.
igbo.what_you_need_to_start_observing_from_: Ihe ịchọrọ iji malite ile anya — site na ngwa n'efu ruo teleskop dabara na ego ọ bụla.
igbo.free_planetarium_software_shows_night_: Sọftwia planetarium n'efu. Ọ na-egosi eluigwe abalị site n'ebe ọ bụla, oge ọ bụla.
igbo.phone_app_point_at_sky_to_identify_wha: Ngwa ekwentị. Tụọ aka n'eluigwe iji mata ihe ị na-ele anya.
igbo.interactive_3d_solar_system_jwst_missi: Usoro anyanwụ 3D nwere mmekọrịta + JWST + ngosi ọrụ.
igbo.best_starter_scope_reveals_galilean_mo: Ngwá mmalite kacha mma. Ọ na-egosi ọnwa Galilean nke Jupiter, Andromeda, ìgwè Pleiades.
igbo.celestron_starsense_explorer_102_or_or: Celestron StarSense Explorer 102 ma ọ bụ Orion 4.5" Newtonian.
igbo.celestron_nexstar_8se_or_apertura_ad8_: Celestron NexStar 8SE ma ọ bụ Apertura AD8 Dobsonian.
igbo.most_cities_have_one_members_lend_scop: Ọtụtụ obodo nwere otu. Ndị òtù na-agbaziri teleskop, na-akụzi, na-eme oriri kpakpando.
igbo.drive_30_min_from_city_lights_maine_is: Kwọọ nkeji 30+ site n'ìhè obodo. Maine jupụtara na ha. Katahdin Woods and Waters bụ ebe nchekwa eluigwe ọchịchịrị a kwadoro.
igbo.most_important_tool_dark_sky_light_pol: Ngwá ọrụ kacha mkpa: eluigwe gbara ọchịchịrị. Mmetọ ìhè na-ehichapụ pasent 90 nke kpakpando. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM na AMC Maine Woods bụ ebe Eluigwe Ọchịchịrị Ụwa Niile a kwadoro; Acadia na Baxter na-enyekwa eluigwe ọchịchịrị mara mma.
igbo.star_s_fate_depends_on_mass_brown_dwar: Ọdịnihu kpakpando dabere n'ibu: nta aja aja, nta ọcha, kpakpando neutron, ma ọ bụ oghere ojii.
igbo.how_a_star_dies_depends_almost_entirel: Ka kpakpando si anwụ dabere fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ kpamkpam n'ibu ya mbụ. Oke n'etiti kpakpando neutron + oghere ojii adịghị doro anya (oke Tolman-Oppenheimer-Volkoff ~2-3 M☉ maka ihe fọdụrụ).
igbo.from_1km_to_93_billion_light_years_ref: Site na kilomita 1 ruo afọ ìhè ijeri 93. Tebụl ntụaka nke ọtụtụ eluigwe.
igbo.distances_jump_in_scale_km_to_au_to_ly: Anya na-awụli n'ọtụtụ: km ruo AU ruo ly ruo ijeri ly. Nzọụkwụ ọ bụla bụ ~ugboro 10,000-100,000 karịa. Nyocha kpakpando na-ebi n'ọtụtụ log.
igbo.maine_has_world_class_dark_skies_what_: Maine nwere eluigwe ọchịchịrị kacha mma n'ụwa. Ihe a ga-achọ n'oge ọ bụla.
igbo.maine_has_fantastic_dark_skies_especia: Maine nwere eluigwe ọchịchịrị dị ịtụnanya — karịsịa n'ugwu obodo. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM na AMC Maine Woods bụ ebe Eluigwe Ọchịchịrị Ụwa Niile a kwadoro; Acadia, Allagash, Baxter, na Cobscook gbakwara ọchịchịrị nke ọma. Abalị oyi dị ogologo + dị ọcha nke ukwuu.
igbo.major_space_missions_events_2024_2027_: Nnukwu ọrụ mbara igwe + ihe omume 2024-2027. Anyị bi n'oge na-adọrọ mmasị.
igbo.space_exploration_is_in_a_renaissance_: Nyocha mbara igwe nọ na mmalitegharị. Mba ọhụrụ (India, Japan, UAE), ụlọ ọrụ nkeonwe ọhụrụ (SpaceX, Blue Origin), ọrụ ọhụrụ (Europa Clipper, Artemis, JWST). Lelie elu — ma ṅaa ntị.
igbo.quick_reference_summary_of_solar_syste: Nchịkọta ntụaka ngwa ngwa nke ihe usoro anyanwụ nwere + nkesa ibu.
igbo.the_sun_contains_99_86_of_all_solar_sy: Anyanwụ nwere pasent 99.86 nke ibu usoro anyanwụ niile. Jupiter nwere ụzọ abụọ n'ime atọ nke pasent 0.14 fọdụrụ. Ụwa + ihe ọzọ niile bụ nke fọdụrụ.
igbo.from_our_own_luna_to_triton_enceladus_: Site na Luna nke anyị ruo Triton + Enceladus. Ụfọdụ buru ibu karịa Mercury.
igbo.most_spectacular_moons_in_the_solar_sy: Ọnwa kacha mara mma na usoro anyanwụ. Ọtụtụ buru ibu karịa Pluto. Europa + Enceladus + Titan nwere oke osimiri n'okpuru elu ma bụrụ ebumnuche nyocha ndụ mbara igwe dị mkpa.

igbo.astronomers_report_everything_in_utc_t: Ndị ọkà mmụta kpakpando na-akọ ihe niile na UTC. Nkọwa mpaghara oge.
igbo.why_we_use_utc: Ihe mere anyị ji eji UTC
igbo.utc_coordinated_universal_time_is_the_: UTC (Oge Ụwa Niile A Haziri) bụ ntụaka ụwa niile. Ọ dabere na elekere atọm.
igbo.astronomers_report_events_in_utc_so_ob: Ndị ọkà mmụta kpakpando na-akọ ihe omume na UTC ka ebe nlele n'ụwa niile wee tụnyere. SpaceX na-ebupụ na UTC. Ọrụ NASA na UTC.
igbo.maine_utc_5_est_or_utc_4_edt_london_ut: Maine: UTC-5 (EST) ma ọ bụ UTC-4 (EDT). Lọndọn: UTC+0 (GMT) ma ọ bụ UTC+1 (BST). Japan: UTC+9.
igbo.tip_when_you_read_an_astronomy_event_t: Ndụmọdụ: mgbe ị gụrụ usoro oge ihe omume nyocha kpakpando, lelee mgbe niile ma ọ bụ UTC ka ọ bụ nke mpaghara.
igbo.utc_replaced_gmt_in_1972_based_on_atom: UTC dochiri GMT na 1972. Ọ dabere na elekere atọm n'ụlọ nyocha mba n'ụwa niile, e were nkezi. A na-agbakwụnye sekọnd mgbe achọrọ.
igbo.40_interactive_tools_to_explore_in_thi: Ngwá ọrụ 40+ nwere mmekọrịta ị ga-enyocha na ngwa a. Nke ọ bụla na-emepe windo ọhụrụ n'ihe gbasara eluigwe.
igbo.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo: Ahụmahụ eluigwe 15 kwesịrị ịchụso. Ọtụtụ n'ime ha bụ n'efu + dị nso.
igbo.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo_2: Ahụmahụ eluigwe 15 kwesịrị ịchụso. Ọtụtụ n'ime ha adịghị efu ihe ọzọ ma e wezụga oge. Eluigwe abalị ajụghị gị ihe ọ bụla — gaa zute ya.
igbo.12_facts_that_defy_what_you_think_you_: Eziokwu 12 na-agbagha ihe i chere na ị maara gbasara mbaraụwa.
igbo.12_things_that_surprise_people_about_o: Ihe 12 na-eju ndị mmadụ anya gbasara usoro anyanwụ anyị. Nke ọ bụla na-agbagha foto echiche.
igbo.pioneer_plaques_voyager_golden_records: Efere Pioneer + Ndekọ Ọlaedo Voyager + Ozi Arecibo — akara ụmụ mmadụ nye onye ọ bụla nwere ike ịnụ.
igbo.gold_anodized_aluminum_on_pioneer_10_1: Aluminum e ji ọlaedo mee na Pioneer 10 + 11. Ọ na-egosi ndị mmadụ gba ọtọ, ebe Ụwa dị, haịdrojen.
igbo.phonograph_record_on_voyager_1_2_115_p: Ndekọ phonograph na Voyager 1 + 2. Foto 115, egwu (Beethoven ruo Chuck Berry), ekele n'asụsụ 55, ụda Ụwa.
